name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: Warm Taco Salad with Creamy Russian Vinaigrette
• ½ tsp kosher salt (plus more to taste)
• 1 tsp apple cider vinegar (brightens it up)
Whisk until smooth and slightly loosened — it should drizzle, not glop.
• 1 ear fresh corn (or ¾ cup frozen), charred in a dry skillet
• ½ small red onion, very thinly sliced
• ½ cup crumbled cotija (or sharp white cheddar)
• 1½ cups good-quality tortilla chips, lightly crushed
recipeInstructions: 1️⃣ Cook the Beef
1. Heat a skillet over medium-high.
2. Add beef and break it up.
3. Once mostly browned, add garlic and cook 30 seconds.
4. Add ancho chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour in water and simmer 3–4 minutes until thickened but still juicy.
6. Stir in apple cider vinegar at the end.
7. Turn heat to low to keep warm.
You want it moist, not dry or crumbly.
2️⃣ Char the Corn
In a dry skillet over high heat, cook corn until blistered and slightly smoky. Set aside.
3️⃣ Dress the Greens
In a large bowl, toss romaine with HALF the vinaigrette. The greens should be lightly coated, not soaked.
4️⃣ Assemble (Warm + Slightly Wilted Effect)
Transfer dressed greens to a wide serving platter or shallow bowl.
Scatter:
• Warm beef (it will gently wilt the lettuce — that’s intentional)
• Charred corn
• Tomatoes
• Red onion
• Avocado
• Cotija
Drizzle remaining vinaigette lightly over the top.
Finish with crushed tortilla chips and a squeeze of lime.
